project_type: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS single-page mind-map/task management app (ThoughtFlow)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` and confirm the build succeeds without errors. The project has no unit tests, so a successful production build is the primary validation.
environment_constraints: No test framework installed. Validation is via successful vite build. No Docker setup.
contribution_requirements: None documented. Standard React component patterns used throughout.
key_patterns: Single-file components (TaskPanel.jsx, FullTaskManager.jsx). Tailwind CSS utility classes for all styling. lucide-react icons. State managed via useState/useMemo hooks. Tasks stored in App.jsx state with props passed down. GROUP_COLORS imported from taskConstants.js. Sidebar panel is 'w-80' width. FullTaskManager uses fixed inset-0 overlay. Both components share STATUS_OPTIONS, PRIORITY_OPTIONS, helper functions (duplicated in each file).
directory_structure: Root: package.json, vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js, index.html. src/: App.jsx (main 5900-line component), TaskPanel.jsx (sidebar, 838 lines), FullTaskManager.jsx (fullscreen, 708 lines), MiniMap.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, taskConstants.js, index.css, main.jsx.
